sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70726" key="nhputieu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηπῠτι-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n70726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play child's tricks,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.140</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
